points.text: Kymera Therapeutics announced Gilead Sciences' exercise of an option to license KT-200, an oral CDK2 molecular glue degrader, for development in oncology indications.
Kymera Therapeutics presented positive Phase 1b BroADen trial data for KT-621, a first-in-class oral STAT6 degrader, at the American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting.
Kymera Therapeutics — KT-200 — CDK2 Molecular Glue Degrader — Gilead Sciences exercised option to license program; deal includes upfront payment and potential milestone payments.
Kymera Therapeutics — KT-200 — Oncology (CDK2 target) — Gilead Sciences exercised option to license oral CDK2 molecular glue degrader; development candidate selected for further advancement.

Kymera Therapeutics — KT-621 — Atopic Dermatitis — Phase 1b BroADen trial presented at AAD 2026 showed consistent biological and clinical impact; Phase 2b BROADEN2 trial ongoing with data expected mid-2027.
Kymera Therapeutics — KT-200 — CDK2 Molecular Glue Degrader — Gilead Sciences exercised license option; program targets CDK2 degradation via molecular glue mechanism.

Kymera Therapeutics — Advancing oral small molecule degrader pipeline — KT-200 (CDK2 molecular glue) + KT-621 (STAT6 degrader) — Gilead option exercised for KT-200; Phase 2b trials for KT-621 in AD and asthma ongoing.
Kymera Therapeutics — Molecular glue degrader licensing — KT-200 (CDK2 degrader) — Gilead option exercised; program advances clinical development of first-in-class CDK2 molecular glue.

KT-200 — Mechanism: Oral CDK2 molecular glue degrader — Phase: Preclinical/Development candidate selection — Population: Oncology indications — Status: Licensed by Gilead Sciences following option exercise.

KT-621 — Mechanism: First-in-class oral STAT6 degrader — Phase: 1b (BroADen) completed, 2b (BROADEN2) ongoing — Population: Atopic dermatitis — Results: Consistent impact on biomarkers and clinical measures reported at AAD 2026.

KT-200 — Mechanism: Molecular glue-mediated CDK2 degradation — Phase: Preclinical/Early clinical — Population: Not specified — Comparator: Not specified — Status: Licensed to Gilead for further development.
Kymera Therapeutics / Gilead Sciences — Option exercise to license KT-200 — Oral CDK2 molecular glue degrader — Gilead exercised option to advance development candidate; financial terms undisclosed.

Kymera Therapeutics / Gilead Sciences — License option exercise — KT-200 (CDK2 molecular glue degrader) — Gilead exercised option; deal includes undisclosed upfront payment and potential milestone payments.
